text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Happy "birthday", obviously… It seems 
the occasion has Ticket crying even harder 
than usual.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
You think? Isn't she always like this? 
I mean, she'll cry for someone's birthday 
even if she just met them.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Believe me, with how much time I spend 
around her, I can tell. She's crying especially 
hard today.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Just the other day you were in bed with a fever, but now here you are, turning one year older… I… Sniffle.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Oh please, what are you trying to… 
Hold on… are you crying for real?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
H-Hayahide! I get you! It just makes you 
so happy, doesn't iiiit?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, gimme a break! What's wrong 
with you two?!
